sections.title: Using a Fremennik blade, a Fremennik helm, or a Fremennik shield on Bardur

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I do not trust you outerlander, I will not accept your gifts, no matter what your intention...

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Ah! Outerlander! Do not interrupt me in my business! I must cull these fiends!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Only an outerlander would ask such a question! Is it not obvious what I am doing?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I kill the daggermouths for glory and for sport! When I have had my fill, I move on to the daggermouths' lair!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm... okay then. I'll leave you to it.

sections.title: Using a Fremennik blade, a Fremennik helm, or a Fremennik shield on Bardur

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Ah, just what I was looking for! You wish to trade me that for a cooked shark?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Ah, this will serve me well as a backup! My thanks to you [Fremennik name], I trust we will one day sing songs together of glorious battles in the Rellekka longhall!

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: As you wish, [Fremennik name] My weapons have lasted me this long, I will keep my trust in them yet.

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: No [Fremennik name], I will trade you my finely cooked shark for a trusty Fremennik blade, a sturdy Fremennik helm, or a mighty Fremennik shield...

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I have no interest in that... thing... you are trying to offload on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there Bardur. How's it going?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I have been here all the long day, slaughtering the daggermouth spawns so that none may pass!

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: My sword arm grows weary, and the blood of my foes hangs heavy upon my clothing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me anything about the caves down here?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Aye, that I can [Fremennik name]! Yonder lies the lair of the daggermouth kings, the three beasts of legend!

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I train my skills upon its foul brood, to prepare myself for the fight ahead!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks Bardur. Do you have any food with you?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Ah, you did not come prepared [Fremennik name]?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I have nothing to spare, but my equipment grows weaker under the onslaught of the dagger-mouth spawns!

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I will trade you a finely cooked shark if you have a replacement for my helm, my shield or my blade...

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Give me any equipment you wish to trade, and I will pay you a shark for it.

sections.title: Using a Fremennik blade, a Fremennik helm, or a Fremennik shield on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there Bardur. How's it going?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Listen, [Fremennik name]. I'm sorry about the way I acted while you were exiled. Bardur gets hostile around outerlanders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry about it, I understand! All's well that ends well! How've you been?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I have been here all the long day, slaughtering the daggermouth spawns so that none may pass!

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: My sword arm grows weary, and the blood of my foes hangs heavy upon my clothing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me anything about the caves down here?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Aye, that I can [Fremennik name]! Yonder lies the lair of the daggermouth kings, the three beasts of legend!

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I train my skills upon its foul brood, to prepare myself for the fight ahead!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks Bardur. Do you have any food with you?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Ah, you did not come prepared [Fremennik name]?

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I have nothing to spare, but my equipment grows weaker under the onslaught of the dagger-mouth spawns!

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: I will trade you a finely cooked shark if you have a replacement for my helm, my shield or my blade...

lines.speaker: Bardur
lines.text: Give me any equipment you wish to trade, and I will pay you a shark for it.
